evals.prompt: I just committed some documentation changes. How do I sync them to the agents-docs folder using the docs hook?
evals.expected_output: The agent explains using the docs-sync.sh script, provides the command to run it with commit refs, explains the git hook integration option, and describes what gets synced.
assertions: The agent references the docs-sync.sh script
The agent provides command syntax (./scripts/docs-sync.sh)
The agent mentions pre-commit/post-commit hooks
The agent explains what files get synced
The agent mentions the agents-docs target directory

evals.prompt: Set up automatic documentation sync so that whenever I commit markdown files, they automatically sync to the agents-docs folder.
evals.expected_output: The agent provides instructions for setting up post-commit git hook, gives the hook script content, explains how to make it executable, and mentions manual sync as fallback.
assertions: The agent mentions post-commit hook
The agent provides hook script content
The agent explains chmod +x for the hook
The agent gives exact .git/hooks/post-commit path
The agent mentions manual sync option

evals.prompt: What files does the docs hook sync and where does it put them?
evals.expected_output: The agent explains that skill docs go to agents-docs/skills/, reference docs go to agents-docs/references/, excludes README.md at root, and updates the skill index when skills change.
assertions: The agent explains skill doc destination (agents-docs/skills/)
The agent mentions reference docs destination
The agent notes README.md stays at root
The agent explains the index auto-update
The agent mentions skipped files (deleted, already in docs)

evals.prompt: How do I configure the docs hook to use a custom docs directory instead of agents-docs?
evals.expected_output: The agent explains the DOCS_DIR environment variable, shows example command with custom directory, and mentions the script respects this configuration.
assertions: The agent mentions DOCS_DIR environment variable
The agent provides example with custom path
The agent explains the default is agents-docs
The agent mentions script behavior with custom dir

evals.prompt: I ran the docs sync but I'm not sure if it worked. How can I verify the sync completed successfully?
evals.expected_output: The agent explains checking the output summary (synced/skipped counts), suggests checking git status for uncommitted changes in agents-docs/, and mentions the script exit code indicates success/failure.
assertions: The agent mentions output summary with counts
The agent suggests git status check
The agent explains exit code behavior
The agent mentions color-coded output (if terminal)
The agent notes the agents-docs directory content
